proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_sotorasib.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_osimertinib.

analyses.result_summary: ORR 0.174 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.164 off; diff=+0.010; chi2 p=0.00341
ORR 0.169 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.169 off; diff=+0.001; chi2 p=0.829
ORR 0.170 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.169 off; diff=+0.001; chi2 p=0.724
ORR 0.165 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.170 off; diff=-0.005; chi2 p=0.179

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher objective_response.
Among patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, tmb_high is associated with higher objective_response than tmb_high=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and pdl1_tps on objective_response.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and tmb_high on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: In pembro arm, ORR 0.197 (TMB-high) vs 0.165 (TMB-low); diff=+0.032; p=2e-09

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_sotorasib and kras_g12c on objective_response (sotorasib benefit concentrated in KRAS G12C+ patients).
There is a positive interaction between treatment_osimertinib and egfr_mutation on objective_response (osimertinib benefit concentrated in EGFR-mutant patients).
There is a positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and brca2_mutation on objective_response (olaparib benefit concentrated in BRCA2-mutant patients).

analyses.code: Logit ORR ~ treatment_sotorasib+kras_g12c+interaction; stratified ORR in kras_g12c+
analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta=+0.059, p=0.427. In kras_g12c+ patients, ORR 0.175 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.166 off (diff=+0.008, p=0.43).

analyses.code: Logit ORR ~ treatment_osimertinib+egfr_mutation+interaction; stratified ORR in egfr_mutation+
analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta=+0.024, p=0.758. In egfr_mutation+ patients, ORR 0.164 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.166 off (diff=-0.002, p=0.87).

analyses.code: Logit ORR ~ treatment_olaparib+brca2_mutation+interaction; stratified ORR in brca2_mutation+
analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta=-0.177, p=0.275. In brca2_mutation+ patients, ORR 0.146 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.168 off (diff=-0.022, p=0.346).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower objective_response (worse performance status reduces response).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response (better nutrition predicts response).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher nlr is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Among treatment_pembrolizumab recipients, stk11_mutation is associated with lower objective_response.
Among treatment_pembrolizumab recipients, keap1_mutation is associated with lower objective_response.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and stk11_mutation on objective_response.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and keap1_mutation on objective_response.

analyses.code: In pembro arm, ORR by stk11_mutation
analyses.result_summary: In pembro: ORR 0.158 (stk11_mutation+) vs 0.177 (stk11_mutation-); diff=-0.019, p=0.00531

analyses.code: In pembro arm, ORR by keap1_mutation
analyses.result_summary: In pembro: ORR 0.171 (keap1_mutation+) vs 0.174 (keap1_mutation-); diff=-0.003, p=0.625

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have lower objective_response than stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have lower objective_response than those without brain metastases.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have lower objective_response than those without liver metastases.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have lower objective_response than those without bone metastases.
Patients with adrenal_mets=1 have lower objective_response than those without adrenal metastases.
Patients with pleural_effusion=1 have lower objective_response.
Squamous histology (histology=='squamous') is associated with a different objective_response rate than adenocarcinoma.
Smoking_status='never' is associated with a different objective_response rate than ever-smokers (current/former).
Older age_years is associated with lower objective_response.
Sex_female=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate than sex_female=0.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with higher objective_response (smoking-related neoantigen burden hypothesis).

analyses.result_summary: ORR squamous 0.174 vs adeno 0.167; diff=+0.007, p=0.0784
ORR never 0.164 vs ever 0.170; diff=-0.006, p=0.208
ORR female 0.175 vs male 0.164; diff=+0.012, p=0.00059

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, stage_iv, and has_brain_mets, treatment_pembrolizumab still has an independent positive association with objective_response.
After adjusting for the same covariates, ecog_ps remains independently associated with lower objective_response.
Pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response is reduced in patients with higher ecog_ps (negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and ecog_ps).
Pembrolizumab benefit differs by age (interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and age_years on objective_response).
alk_fusion+ patients have a different objective_response rate than alk_fusion- patients.
braf_v600e+ patients have a different objective_response rate.
met_exon14_skipping+ patients have a different objective_response rate.
ros1_fusion+ patients have a different objective_response rate.
ret_fusion+ patients have a different objective_response rate.
ntrk_fusion+ patients have a different objective_response rate.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and egfr_mutation on objective_response (immunotherapy benefit attenuated in EGFR-mutant tumors).
There is a negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and alk_fusion on objective_response.
There is no positive interaction between treatment_sotorasib and egfr_mutation on objective_response (negative control: sotorasib targets KRAS, not EGFR).
There is no positive interaction between treatment_osimertinib and kras_g12c on objective_response (negative control: osimertinib targets EGFR, not KRAS).
There is no positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and egfr_mutation on objective_response.
Among kras_g12c+ patients, treatment_sotorasib produces a higher objective_response rate than no sotorasib.
Among egfr_mutation+ patients, treatment_osimertinib produces a higher objective_response rate than no osimertinib.
Among brca2_mutation+ patients, treatment_olaparib produces a higher objective_response rate than no olaparib.
Among kras_g12c- patients, treatment_sotorasib does NOT improve objective_response (specificity check).
Among egfr_mutation- patients, treatment_osimertinib does NOT improve objective_response (specificity check).

analyses.code: In kras_g12c=1 stratum, ORR by treatment_sotorasib
analyses.result_summary: In kras_g12c=1 (n=6368): ORR 0.175 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.166 off; diff=+0.008, p=0.43

analyses.code: In egfr_mutation=1 stratum, ORR by treatment_osimertinib
analyses.result_summary: In egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517): ORR 0.164 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.166 off; diff=-0.002, p=0.87

analyses.code: In brca2_mutation=1 stratum, ORR by treatment_olaparib
analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519): ORR 0.146 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.168 off; diff=-0.022, p=0.346

analyses.code: In kras_g12c=0 stratum, ORR by treatment_sotorasib
analyses.result_summary: In kras_g12c=0 (n=43632): ORR 0.169 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.169 off; diff=-0.000, p=0.954

analyses.code: In egfr_mutation=0 stratum, ORR by treatment_osimertinib
analyses.result_summary: In egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483): ORR 0.166 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.171 off; diff=-0.005, p=0.174

proposed_hypotheses.text: diabetes_mellitus is associated with a different objective_response rate.
copd is associated with a different objective_response rate.
chronic_kidney_disease is associated with a different objective_response rate.
autoimmune_disease is associated with a different objective_response rate.
interstitial_lung_disease_history is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Black race_ethnicity is associated with a different objective_response rate compared with white.
Medicaid insurance is associated with a different objective_response rate compared with private insurance.
rural_residence=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher education_years is associated with higher objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: ORR black 0.178 vs white 0.165; diff=+0.012, p=0.0219
ORR medicaid 0.161 vs private 0.172; diff=-0.011, p=0.0417
ORR rural 0.167 vs urban 0.170; diff=-0.003, p=0.497

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response (anemia is a poor prognostic marker).
Higher platelets_k_ul is associated with lower objective_response (thrombocytosis as adverse prognostic marker).
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with lower objective_response (proxy for liver/bone mets).
Higher alc_k_ul (absolute lymphocyte count) is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher cough_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with lower objective_response.
prior_immunotherapy=1 is associated with lower objective_response (refractory population).
prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
prior_radiation=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher years_since_diagnosis is associated with a different objective_response rate.
tp53_mutation is associated with a different objective_response rate.
pik3ca_mutation is associated with a different objective_response rate.
pten_loss is associated with a different objective_response rate.
cdkn2a_loss is associated with a different objective_response rate.
her2_amplification is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher bmi is associated with higher objective_response (obesity-paradox in immunotherapy).
Lower spo2_pct is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher heart_rate_bpm is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher systolic_bp_mmhg is associated with a different objective_response rate.
snp_rs1045642 carrier status is not associated with objective_response (negative control).
snp_rs429358 (APOE) carrier status is not associated with objective_response.
snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR) carrier status is not associated with objective_response.
Across 23 SNPs, the count of significant associations with objective_response at alpha=0.05 is approximately consistent with the null.

analyses.code: 23 chi-square tests of SNPs vs ORR
analyses.result_summary: 2/23 SNPs achieved p<0.05; expected under null ~1.2

proposed_hypotheses.text: After full multivariable adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab x pdl1_tps interaction is positive on objective_response.
After full multivariable adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab x stk11_mutation interaction is negative on objective_response.
prior_surgery=1 is associated with higher objective_response (lower disease burden).
msi_high=1 is associated with higher objective_response.
prior_targeted_therapy=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate.
venous_thromboembolism_history is associated with lower objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, the treatment_sotorasib x kras_g12c interaction remains a positive predictor of objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, the treatment_osimertinib x egfr_mutation interaction remains a positive predictor of objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, the treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction remains a positive predictor of objective_response.

Multivariable logit with all matched-biomarker interactions

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ast_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher alt_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Lower sodium_meq_l (hyponatremia) is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher calcium_mg_dl (hypercalcemia, possibly bone-mets-related) is associated with lower objective_response.
